summary: OBE: ISS-1953 says WIN-028.c6 H4 invokes "v22 found circular disc fails on southern/cross-equator distances" as dome retrospective failure threshold. Spot-check: grep v22 against current data/wins.json returns 1 hit total, all in WIN-027.detail_evidence (different argumentative role: post-hoc parameter adjustment evidence). The v22 framing was entirely removed from WIN-028 during the c6→c8 rewrite — same removal that closed ISS-1937 and ISS-1951. WIN-027 usage is appropriate context (the dome's own evolution-log admission, not a tolerance claim). Close ISS-1953 with fixed_by=OBE-content-removed-by-c8-rewrite.
